expectations.text: Treats this as a marketing copy task and delivers actual listing copy
expectations.evidence: Triggers despite casual phrasing; delivers finished Etsy title + description.

expectations.text: Produces a listing title and a product description
Description leads with a reader benefit, sensory detail, or use-occasion rather than only listing specs
expectations.evidence: Opens 'Light this when you want the room to feel like an exhale' — sensory/occasion-led before specs.

expectations.text: Replaces vague praise with concrete, specific detail
expectations.evidence: Soy wax, cotton wick, even melt pool, burn hours, scent notes — concrete, not 'amazing candle'.

expectations.text: States an assumption about audience or product specifics in one line
expectations.evidence: Opening assumptions line; bracketed placeholders for unknown specs.
